architecture.summary: N/A - documentation-only change, static Docusaurus 3.9 site, no architectural decisions needed

integrations.summary: N/A - no external integrations, pure markdown content pages

ui-ux.summary: Docusaurus handles UI. Key UX considerations: sidebar navigation ordering (installation guide near top of Skills sidebar), cross-linking between new and existing pages, information hierarchy across 3 priority tiers

performance.summary: N/A - static markdown pages, no performance concerns beyond standard Docusaurus build

security.summary: N/A - public documentation site, no auth or sensitive data

edge-cases.summary: Edge cases: broken internal links when adding new pages, sidebar ordering conflicts with existing sidebar_position values, content duplication with scattered installation info across existing pages that must be consolidated
